---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a capability that isn't a single detection rule
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do that Argus doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it touches the finding pipeline, note how it fits
the existing shape (scoring, remediation, output formats).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches, and why this one.

## Does it fit the philosophy?

Argus is about contextual, explained, remediable findings — not raw detection
volume. A sentence on how this serves that helps us prioritize.
